colors.usage_rules: Background must be #0A0F1E (Midnight Navy). Text is Titanium White (#FFFFFF). Glows are Sentinel Cyan (#00F0FF). Use 'Threat Red' (#FF3B30) sparingly for threat indicators.

styles.h1: font-serif text-5xl md:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-[1.1]
styles.label: font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-cyan-400

typography.rules: Use Playfair Display for all Headings to evoke 'Old Money/Sovereignty'. Use Inter for dense data. Use JetBrains Mono for the 'Threat Ticker' and data values.

spacing.scale: Relaxed. Use p-8, p-12, p-16 for containers. Gap-8 minimum for grids.

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise overlay on the #0A0F1E background to prevent banding and add 'film' quality.

layout_strategy.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode A). Asymmetric layouts. Avoid centering everything.
layout_strategy.hero_structure: Split screen or 2/3 Grid. Left: Sovereign Value Prop. Right/Bottom: Interactive Threat Ticker.

elements.spec: Midnight Navy #0A0F1E with faint 'World Map' or 'Data Points' texture. Overlay Sydney Skyline image with heavy blue/navy duotone.
Playfair Display. 'Command Your Business Sovereignty'. Titanium White.
A horizontal or vertical scrolling marquee. Font: JetBrains Mono. Content: 'THREAT BLOCKED: 14:02 AEST', 'INTELLIGENCE ACQUIRED: SYDNEY NODE'. Color: Cyan/Red.
Solid White pill button with Navy text (High Contrast) OR Cyan Glow button.
Server Room Image (Darkened). Overlay lock icons or shield vectors.
Large typographic badge: 'AES-256'. Animated glowing border.
Text emphasizing 'Australian Data Sovereignty'. Data stays in Oz.

pricing.name: Strategy Squad Pricing
pricing.style: Cards. 'Sovereign' tier must use the 'Tracing Beam' border effect (Cyan glow moving around the card).

assets.icons: Use Lucide React. stroke-width=1.5 for elegance. Colors: Cyan or White.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL_DEPENDENCIES: Run 'yarn add framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge' immediately.
THEME_SETUP: Update tailwind.config.js to include the specific Midnight Navy (#0A0F1E) and Sentinel Cyan (#00F0FF) colors.
FONT_SETUP: Ensure Playfair Display and JetBrains Mono are imported (via Google Fonts in index.html or CSS).
CLEANUP: Remove any default light mode variables in index.css. Force Dark Mode by default.
EXECUTION: Build the Landing Page components first (Hero, Ticker, Pricing), then the Trust page.
ANIMATION: Use framer-motion for the 'Threat Ticker' (infinite loop) and entrance animations (fade up).
GLASSMORPHISM: Use the specific backdrop-blur-xl classes defined in design_system.visual_enhancers.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid #0A0F1E.
Use Playfair Display for ALL Headings. NO EXCEPTIONS.
Buttons must be rounded-full (pill) or sharp (rounded-sm) - decide on one. Recommendation: Sharp for 'Command' feel.
All interactive elements must have hover states (text-cyan-400 or bg-white/10).
Respect the Australian context (AEST timezones, AUD currency, Australian English spelling).
